<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="Z-vLlnaU6flmiDgZML-r"> <mxGraphModel dx="732" dy="1196" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="dN_KMffzpd3Afiihe7Rt-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1" value="Event Booking Microservices" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="520" x="510" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dN_KMffzpd3Afiihe7Rt-2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2" value="Traefik gateway · 4 microservices · Kafka · CQRS / Event Sourcing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="520" x="510" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dN_KMffzpd3Afiihe7Rt-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" value="CLIENT
